title: Asymmetric Cryptography: Public Keys and the Key Distribution Revolution
description: Master public-key cryptography - the breakthrough that solved the key distribution problem. Understand RSA, elliptic curves, and why these systems are vulnerable to quantum computers.
learningObjectives: Explain the revolutionary concept of public-key cryptography
Describe how RSA encryption and decryption work mathematically
Understand the discrete logarithm problem and elliptic curve cryptography
Compare RSA and ECC in terms of security and performance
Analyze why Shor's algorithm breaks both RSA and ECC
Implement basic asymmetric encryption using standard libraries
